title: One Heart Mode
description: One Heart Mode makes Minecraft brutally challenging: players survive with only 1 heart (2 HP) forever. Perfect for hardcore and survival challenge fans!
body:
**One Heart Mode – Hardcore Challenge Mod

Do you think you’re a true Minecraft survivor? One Heart Mode turns every game into a fight for life!

Players permanently have only 1 heart (2 HP).

Works in survival and multiplayer.

No cheats, no gimmicks – one mistake and it’s over.

Perfect for hardcore challenge videos, YouTube/TikTok content, or self-imposed survival trials.

💡 Extra Fun Ideas:

Combine with “No Natural Regeneration” for a super hardcore experience.

Try surviving against mobs, lava, and fall damage with just 1 heart.

🎯 Why You’ll Love It:

Extremely simple but surprisingly intense gameplay.

Easy to install – compatible with Forge or Fabric (depending on your build).

Lightweight and free – no extra dependencies required.

Challenge your friends and see who survives the longest in One Heart Mode!**
